title: [MTR 3/4] StarTrain B600
description: A low-floor-boarding tram for MTR mod.
body:
## **Thanks for 500 downloads!**

This resource pack adds the StarTrain B600. This pack requires Minecraft Transit Railway in order to work properly.

**NOTICE: Trains must have an even number of cars!!!**

This pack has an MTR3 version and an MTR4 version. MTR version 4.0.3 is required for the MTR4 version to work!
